prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约218名、217名、269名、179名、268名，整体波动较大，近5年位次在179–269之间震荡，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约268名；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为10人，2025年增至11人，2026年计划为12人，连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第7名，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2025年高考周期内声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为少年班创立做出贡献）；2026年周期内出现师德师风相关负面事件，但作为顶尖理工院校，整体报考热度未受明显冲击；抖音综合热度排名第12位（高热），短视频平台关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科达19个，其中数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等8个学科获评A+，学科实力极为突出，对优质生源有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年云南省普通高考总人数约37.79万人，较2025年大幅增加；按近年物理类占比约60.65%估算，2026年物理类考生约22.92万人，较2025年17.33万人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在云南省招生人数较少（约10–12人），招生占比极小，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划小幅扩招（12人）及云南省物理类考生大幅增加（约+32%）等因素，扩招对位次有下移（数字增大）作用，考生增加对位次有上移（数字减小）作用，两者形成对冲。考虑到中科大作为顶尖高校对高分考生吸引力稳定，且2025年基准位次268名处于历史中高位，预计2026年最低位次在268名附近，区间250–346名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班，含数学类华罗庚班、物理学类严济慈班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术，华夏计算机科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（量子未来技术试点班，量子信息科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含人工智能、自动化、集成电路等）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班，含计算机类华夏班、电子信息类信息科技英才班等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学、光电信息科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 理科试验班类（统计大数据与商业AI试验班，含统计学、金融学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 中国科学技术大学在云南省仅招收物理类考生，招生人数极少（约12人），竞争极为激烈。位次在预测区间250–346名内的考生可积极报考，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业为冲刺、三档专业为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如250名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌英才班；位次接近区间上限（如346名附近）建议以三档专业为主，谨慎报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 218, 217, 269, 179, and 268 respectively, with overall large fluctuations. Over the past 5 years, rankings oscillated between 179 and 269, with no obvious unilateral trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 268. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science/physics category was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 11 in 2025, and planned to be 12 in 2026, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Shanghai Ranking for many years, belonging to the top-tier universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was relatively positive (the passing of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee, who contributed to the establishment of the Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, there were negative incidents related to teacher ethics, but as a top science and engineering university, overall application enthusiasm was not significantly impacted. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 12th (high heat), with considerable attention on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it had 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including 8 disciplines rated A+: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering. Its discipline strength is extremely prominent, continuously attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the recent proportion of physics category students at about 60.65%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 229,200, an increase of about 32% from 173,300 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment in Yunnan Province is small (about 10–12 students), with a very small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the slight expansion in 2026 (12 students), and the significant increase in physics category examinees in Yunnan Province (about +32%), the expansion tends to lower the ranking (increase the number), while the increase in examinees tends to raise the ranking (decrease the number), creating a counterbalance. Given that USTC, as a top university, has stable attraction for high-scoring students, and the baseline ranking of 268 in 2025 is at a historically mid-to-high level, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be around 268, with a range of 250–346.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class, including Mathematics Class Hua Luogeng Class, Physics Class Yan Jici Class)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class, Quantum Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Class (including Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Technology Elite Class, including Computer Class Huaxia Class, Electronic Information Class Information Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Physics Class (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics Big Data and Business AI Experimental Class, including Statistics, Finance, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Science and Technology of China only recruits physics category students in Yunnan Province, with a very small number (about 12 students), making competition extremely intense. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 250–346 can actively apply. It is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 250) can focus on challenging the top-tier elite classes in Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 346) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and apply cautiously.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
